# Stock Picking Invoice Link

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:b84770438e83e728fc3e438a5542c07883adb15b786fff744733439c6992bcd4
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a link between pickings and invoices as well as on the
lines. Invoices are generated from sales orders. With this module, you
can find back which deliveries an invoice relates to.

In standard, if you make a partial delivery and invoice it, then make
remaining delivery and invoice it, it is impossible to known to what
delivery the invoices relate to. You only have the quantity.

This module is also useful if you want to present data on the invoice
report grouped by deliveries.

Note that the links are only for products with an invoicing policy set
on delivery.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

- Create a Sales Order and confirm.
- Deliver its pickings totally or partially.
- Create an invoice of the goods delivered.
- If you open invoice form, you must see a new Pickings tab with
  information about them.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.models.stock_picking.StockPicking.action_view_invoice
documentation:
This function returns an action that display existing invoices
of given stock pickings.
It can either be a in a list or in a form view, if there is only
one invoice to show.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.models.stock_move.StockMove.write
documentation:
User can update any picking in done state, but if this picking already
invoiced the stock move done quantities can be different to invoice
line quantities. So to avoid this inconsistency you can not update any
stock move line in done state and have invoice lines linked.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.models.account_move.AccountMove.action_show_picking
documentation:
This function returns an action that display existing pickings
of given invoice.
It can either be a in a list or in a form view, if there is only
one picking to show.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.models.account_move.AccountMoveLine.copy_data
documentation:
Copy the move_line_ids in case of refund invoice creating a new invoice
(refund_method="modify").

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.wizards.account_move_reversal.AccountMoveReversal.reverse_moves
documentation: Link return moves to the lines of refund invoice

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.tests.test_stock_picking_invoice_link.TestStockPickingInvoiceLink.test_invoice_refund_invoice
documentation:
Check that the invoice created after a refund is linked to the stock
picking.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_invoice_link.tests.test_stock_picking_invoice_link.TestStockPickingInvoiceLink.test_partial_invoice_full_link
documentation:
Check that the partial invoices are linked to the stock
picking.
